title: Saudi Arabia vs Uruguay Box Score - June 15, 2026 - The Athletic
fetched: raw-HTML 直抓 + 抽取(html:paragraphs) + 清洗（逐字、未经任何模型/改写/翻译）
original_text:
Saudi Arabia hold Uruguay to draw. Weren't there supposed to be 'underdogs' in Group H?

Anybody else having a ton of difficulty watching the games on the Fox Sports app? Just going to watch in Spanish on peacock because it's significantly better quality.

We just lost the Fox channel on Hulu. Now only on Telemundo, which sort of seems like an upgrade.
